name: Crockpot Mexican Style Short Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the short ribs in a large skillet or crock-pot with browning unit.
2. Pour off excess fat from the skillet.
3. Mix the beef consomme with the taco seasoning mix and chopped green pepper.
4. Pour the sauce mixture over the short ribs in the crock-pot.
5. Cover and cook on low for 6 to 8 hours.
Makes 5-6 servings.
